name: Rasielmon

signature_move.name: Knowledge Stream
signature_move.description: Freely combines thefive elementsfrom themagic circleson both of its arms and releases enormous energy.

description: An Ophan Digimon that was once appointed to the same rank as Ofanimon . It possesses the mysterious power to see right through everything in the world from the " Kernel " ( God 's domain). It is said that with that power, it knows all about events that happen throughout the Digital World , and has accumulated a divine amount of knowledge. Its Special Move is freely combining the five elements from the magic circle s on its arms and releasing enormous energy ( Knowledge Stream ). As for its " Sefer Raziel ", which brings about all kinds of miracles to exterminate the adversary, not even Rasielmon itself knows what will happen.
